ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the school */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the school is located */,
  "metro_type" TEXT /* Type of metropolitan area (e.g., urban, suburban) */,
  "charter" INTEGER /* Indicates if the school is a charter school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email of the principal */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled */,
  "website" TEXT /* School website URL */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the school is public */,
  "is_magnet" INTEGER /* Indicates if the school is a magnet school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donations" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school receiving the donation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the donation occurred */,
  "total_donations" REAL /* Total amount of donations received */,
  "donors" INTEGER /* Count of individual donors contributing */,
  "matching_eligible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the donations are eligible for matching funds */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date when the donation was made */,
  "donor_name" TEXT /* Name of the donor (if individual) */,
  "donor_email" TEXT /* Email of the donor */,
  "donor_type" TEXT /* Type of donor (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  "donation_description" TEXT /* Description of the donation */,
  "donation_status" TEXT /* Status of the donation (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "donation_receipt_id" TEXT /* ID of the donation receipt (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "focus_areas" (
  "focus_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each focus area */,
  "focus_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the focus area (e.g., Math & Science, Literacy & Language) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the focus area */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the primary focus area for the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("focus_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "resource_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type (e.g., Books, Technology) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "is_urgent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the resource type is urgently needed */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the resource type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poverty_levels" (
  "poverty_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poverty level */,
  "poverty_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the poverty level (e.g., Highest poverty) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the poverty level */,
  "is_severe" INTEGER /* Indicates if the poverty level is severe */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for determining the poverty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poverty_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grade_levels" (
  "grade_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade level */,
  "grade_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade level (e.g., Grades PreK-2, Grades 6-8) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade level */,
  "is_specialized" INTEGER /* Indicates if the grade level is specialized (e.g., special education) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_focus" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "focus_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the focus area */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the focus area is currently active for the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id", "focus_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_resources" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource type */,
  "quantity_needed" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource type needed */,
  "quantity_received" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource type received */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the resource request was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id", "resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_poverty" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "poverty_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poverty level */,
  "assessment_year" INTEGER /* Year when the poverty level was assessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id", "poverty_level_id")
)
